description:
How 10 of the world's biggest construction mega builds hit the buffers in 2025.
🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/10-biggest-construction-fails-of-2025
For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m

0:00 Intro
0:41 1 - Bangkok's Metro Collapse
1:58 2 - Manchester United's New Stadium
3:22 3 - Saudi Arabia's Giga Projects
4:52 4 - Australia's Snowy 2.0
6:15 5 - The Chernobyl Drone Attack
7:11 6 - China's New London Embassy
8:40 7 - Britain's Hinkley Point C
9:39 8 - Germany's Stuttgart 21
10:56 9 - California High-Speed Rail
12:01 10 - Britain's High-Speed 2 (HS2)

We're raising awareness of construction's mental health crisis through our Get Construction Talking initiative. There’s a video series on our channel and you can find support or donate at - https://www.getconstructiontalking.org/
